name: Sour Cream Raisin Pie from Blue Gentian Restaurant
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a double boiler and stir until well mixed.
Cook until the mixture reaches the consistency of heavy cream filling and turns dark in color. Stir occasionally.
2. Pour the filling into a baked pie shell.
3. Top with meringue.
4. Bake until the meringue darkens.
